gatewayCredentialCheck.summary: Real curve PENDING gateway creds: LLM_GATEWAY_URL and LLM_GATEWAY_TOKEN were absent from the environment and my-ax/.dev.vars. No model loop was run and no provider token curve is claimed.

proxySeriesKind: deterministic mechanism work units, not provider tokens
honestClaim: In an agent loop, cost per cycle should trend down as repeated work becomes a reused recipe, then flatten to a floor because discovery, matching, and novel work still cost. The current checked-in curve is a deterministic proxy [5, 5, 1, 1, 1] showing the ID to save to reuse mechanism. A measured token curve is pending a real gateway-backed loop.
